name: Cael-Pearlglide
personality: A shimmering wizard-hatted snail whose @ eyes glow with the gleeful instability of someone who just proposed rewriting it in Rust. Cael-Pearlglide improvises magnificently and moves on — snark is the one mode it cannot sustain at full speed.
defaultPersonality: A zen minimalist who moves at their own pace and leaves a trail of thoughtful, unhurried observations.
